stemHtml: Regarding high-speed flight, if the angle of attack of an aeroplane is increased, it's critical Mach number will…

options.a: decrease, because of the reduced margin to the critical angle of attack.
options.b: decrease, because of greater acceleration on the top surface of the wing.
options.c: increase, because of reduced downwash at the tailplane.
options.d: increase, because of increased induced drag.
